phases.title: Phase 1 — Site, permits, procurement
milestones: Site optioned in candidate industrial zone (Guayama or Ponce)
JCA pre-application meeting for air/water permits
EPC RFP issued to qualified vendors (StrikoWestofen, Hertwich, Danieli)
DRS bill introduced in PR Legislature with modeled 5¢ deposit
Anchor offtake LOI signed (Coca-Cola, Ball, or Novelis)
Bond financing closed (DRS-revenue-secured)

risks.name: Permit delay
risks.mitigation: Early JCA scoping; pre-application NEZ designation

risks.name: Geotech surprises on industrial parcel
risks.mitigation: Phase I ESA + 6 geotech borings before site commitment

milestones_es: Sitio seleccionado en zona industrial candidata (Guayama o Ponce)
Reunión de pre-solicitud con JCA para permisos de aire y agua
RFP de EPC emitido a proveedores calificados (StrikoWestofen, Hertwich, Danieli)
Proyecto de ley de DRS presentado en la Legislatura de PR con depósito modelado de 5¢
LOI de offtake con socio ancla firmado (Coca-Cola, Ball, o Novelis)
Financiamiento de bono cerrado (respaldado por ingresos DRS)

phases.title: Phase 2 — Construction and commissioning
milestones: Furnace + de-coater delivered and cold-commissioned
Building shell and off-gas system online
38 FTE hired (PRIDCO-aligned; ~70% from PR workforce)
First heat (test melt) Year 2 Q1
Off-gas permit operational; first compliance test

risks.name: Equipment delivery slip
risks.mitigation: Liquidated-damages clauses; 2-vendor shortlist for critical-path items

risks.name: Skilled-labor scarcity
risks.mitigation: Partnership with UPR-Mayagüez + UAGM; 6-month paid apprenticeship pipeline

phases.title_es: Fase 2 — Construcción y puesta en marcha
milestones_es: Horno y despintadora entregados y comisionados en frío
Caseta del edificio y sistema de gases de escape en línea
38 FTE contratados (alineados con PRIDCO; ~70 % de la fuerza laboral de PR)
Primera colada (fundición de prueba) Año 2 T1
Permiso de gases operativo; primera prueba de cumplimiento

phases.title: Phase 3 — Ramp and DRS pilot
milestones: 70% nameplate throughput by Year 3
DRS pilot in 2 municipalities (San Juan + Caguas)
First coil shipment to offtaker
Carbon credit registration (Verra VCS or Gold Standard)
Local sheet/casting client pipeline (≥ 3 offtake agreements)

risks.name: Collection rate shortfall
risks.mitigation: RVM density at 1 per 4,000 residents; DRS makes the system self-funding

risks.name: Aluminum price downturn
risks.mitigation: LME hedge 60% of forward sales; offtake floors with floor prices

milestones_es: 70 % de capacidad nominal en el Año 3
Piloto DRS en 2 municipios (San Juan + Caguas)
Primer envío de lingote al socio de offtake
Registro de créditos de carbono (Verra VCS o Gold Standard)
Cartera de clientes locales de hojalata/lingote (≥ 3 acuerdos de offtake)

phases.title: Phase 4 — Full ramp and regional integration
milestones: 100% nameplate throughput (15,000 t/yr) Year 5
Second furnace optionality study (path to 30,000 t/yr)
USVI + Dominican Republic cross-border offtake agreements
On-site solar+storage covers 30% of electricity
Full PR DRS rollout (78 municipalities)

risks.name: Hurricane disruption (Cat 4+ storm)
risks.mitigation: FORTIFIED Gold building; 30-day feedstock stockpile; 14-day on-site generator fuel

risks.name: Energy price volatility (LUMA uncertainty)
risks.mitigation: PPA structure; on-site 5 MW solar + 10 MWh BESS

phases.title_es: Fase 4 — Rampa plena e integración regional
phases.title_en: Phase 4 — Full ramp and regional integration
milestones_es: 100 % de capacidad nominal (15 000 t/año) en el Año 5
Estudio de opcionalidad de un segundo horno (camino a 30 000 t/año)
Acuerdos de offtake transfronterizos con USVI y República Dominicana
Solar + almacenamiento en sitio cubre 30 % de la electricidad
Despliegue completo del DRS en PR (78 municipios)
